channel.title: OnThisDay
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from OnThisDay, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Today in History for 22nd April 2026
item.description: Historical Events 1601 - First expedition of the English East India Company to the Spice Islands of the Moluccas departs Torbay 1988 - Women are allow...
